name: Oatmeal Carmelitas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup semisweet chocolate chips, or milk chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crust ingredients and blend well.
2. Press half of the mixture into a 9-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Blend the topping with flour and spread over all.
6. Sprinkle with remaining crust crumbs and bake 15-20 minutes or until golden.
